title: General
description: Procurement status table for cross-project lab purchases
summary: General hardware procurement live list: current purchase status, route, and non-sensitive logistics notes for lab support items. Current additions include item-level purchase links for v0 real-robot demo objects plus VIVE Tracker / MANUS charging cables; existing COM2-seat props should still be fit-checked before duplicate purchase.

rows.notes: ETA 2026-06-16 to 2026-06-19; currently at Hangzhou airport. Needed because the stock VIVE Tracker strap cannot tighten enough on the chest.

rows.item: Tracker quick-release / headset top fixed base
rows.notes: For Tracker / PICO4 / Quest 3 headset mounting in human-centric VR data collection. User reported shipped on 2026-06-16.
VRChat-style face and eye capture candidate for human-centric data collection. User reported shipped on 2026-06-16.
Large-space VR / dexterous-hand capture candidate. User reported shipped on 2026-06-16.
Touch / vibration feedback accessory for VR capture experiments. User reported shipped on 2026-06-16.
Marked done by user on 2026-06-12. Lab previously bought four; current request was six 2m cables.
Needed for RealSense bottom mounting; D435 bottom thread is imperial 1/4-inch.
Matching nuts for the 1/4-inch camera screw path. RealSense rear holes remain M3; keep both mounting routes.

Chat request from Zheng Yuhang: see whether alchdata can be sourced, also procure one Claude Max, and route through a supplier. Keep account, payment, invoice, and credentials out of the public dashboard.

User request: buy 20 Singapore/UK BS1363 to China GB plug adapters. Needed because the lab needs many sockets and conversion plugs. Confirm safety rating, grounding, fuse, and whether high-power robot/PC loads are allowed before bulk use.

User request: buy some China-standard sockets / power strips. Need Wuhao to confirm quantity, socket count, cable length, grounding, surge protection, max current, and intended destination before checkout.

rows.item: 20x UK three-pin rice-cooker / IEC power cords
rows.notes: User request: arrange 20 UK-standard three-pin power cords. Treat as UK plug to rice-cooker / IEC-style power cable until the exact appliance-side connector is confirmed; verify BS1363 plug, fuse rating, cable gauge, length, and whether the target connector is IEC C13/C15 or another rice-cooker style.

rows.item: Toy knife for slime-clay cutting / 儿童仿真切菜刀玩具
rows.notes: For 01 toy-knife slime-clay cutting: blunt-edge toy knife only. Keep Stage 0/1 limited to toy knife, washable surface, low speed, and cleanable fixture.

rows.item: M&G ultra-light clay / 晨光超轻粘土
rows.notes: For 01 toy-knife slime-clay cutting: slime-clay cutting material; verify cleanability, deformation visibility, and whether it sticks to the toy knife or fixture.

rows.item: Jenga tower blocks / Jenga叠叠高积木
rows.notes: For 02 Jenga extraction: tower or custom block stack; still needs target-block marking material, non-slip base / anti-slip mat, owner assignment, and gripper/tactile readiness confirmation before run.

rows.item: Grey leather desktop mat / 灰色皮革办公桌垫
rows.notes: Reusable tabletop protection / visibility mat for slime-clay cutting and plastic-bag rubbing; confirm washable surface, camera contrast, and whether it slips under robot contact.
For 03 Wuji plastic-bag rubbing: confirm Aloha-style or equivalent 3M anti-slip tape if not already available. Use the grey desktop mat row as the current tabletop/background candidate.

For 04 Lego tool operation: Lego brick separator plus safe plastic small tools such as small hammer-style and plier-style tools. Existing candidate link is still useful, but first-round procurement should prioritize safe tool size and compatibility with large bricks.

rows.item: Large-particle building blocks / 大颗粒拼装积木
rows.notes: For 04 Lego tool operation: first round should use large-particle bricks before moving to small-particle or random bulk pieces. Compare Singapore shipping and total price; purchase still needs human confirmation.

rows.item: Desktop broom + dustpan set / 桌面小扫把簸箕套装
rows.notes: For broom-to-dustpan long-horizon failure-data demo. Transfer and inspect Boris' existing COM2-seat broom/dustpan first; buy this candidate only if the existing prop is missing or unsuitable.

rows.item: Math cube teaching blocks / 正方体数学教具积木
rows.notes: For the two 90-degree cube-turn long-horizon failure-data demo. Transfer and inspect Boris' existing COM2-seat cube first; buy this candidate only if the existing prop is missing or unsuitable.

rows.route: Taobao / supplier · VIVE Tracker + MANUS charging
rows.notes: User request: buy two one-to-three charging/data cables with all three outputs as Type-C / USB-C; about 1m length should be enough. Intended for VIVE Tracker and MANUS charging; confirm charge-only vs data capability before checkout. User-provided Taobao share code: CA381.
